files.02_GPU_Computing.md: Add Learning Objectives. CUDA example is excellent and complete (lines 62-315). Kokkos section (lines 380-810) is comprehensive but duplicates some concepts from CUDA. Good 'What to Learn from Each' section missing from this file - add comparative insights. Missing Key Takeaways. Add section on when to use CUDA vs Kokkos vs OpenCL. 3W Framework not explicitly applied.
files.03_Modern_Cpp_for_CFD.md: Most complete file but still needs structure improvements. Add Learning Objectives section. Code examples are excellent but lack consistency in OpenFOAM context. Missing Key Takeaways summary. 'Why OpenFOAM Doesn't Use These Yet' section is valuable but should be expanded into a full decision framework. Add practical migration guide from C++11/14 to C++17/20. Exercise section is present but could be more concrete.

global_strategy: Folder needs significant restructuring for learning effectiveness. COMPLETED: Split 01_Alternative_Architectures.md into 5 focused files. Installation instructions are now focused per-tool. Bilingual content (Thai/English) maintained consistently.
